flagDetails.name: Fosroc Ronaform
flagDetails.evidence: No 'Ronaform' product exists on fosroc.com.au, fosroc.com or the AU catalogue; name is a confusion. Fosroc AU release agents are the 'Form Release Agent' SKU and the global Reebol Emulsion line. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/form-release-agent ; https://www.fosroc.com/product/show/reebol-emulsion

flagDetails.name: Tremco Eucocrete WB Cure
flagDetails.evidence: No 'Eucocrete WB Cure' in Tremco CPG Australia catalogue; 'Eucocrete' is their repair-mortar family, not a curing compound. The genuine AU water-based acrylic curing compound is Tremco Evencure AC (AS 3799). https://www.tremco.com.au/products/surface-treatments/curing-compounds

flagDetails.name: Westox RAP Adhesive
flagDetails.evidence: Westox RAP is a heritage plaster-lath-ceiling reinstatement system, not a concrete re-alkalisation product. RAP Adhesive is a liquid water-based acrylic adhesive/primer (5/20 L), not a cementitious primer. https://westox.com/product/rap-adhesive/

flagDetails.name: Westox RAP Primer DG
flagDetails.evidence: Westox's own page describes RAP Primer DG as a penetrating primer for wood-lath ceiling reinstatement / re-establishing adhesion of drummy plaster, NOT a carbonated-concrete re-alkalisation primer. https://westox.com/product/rap-primer-dg/

flagDetails.name: Westox RAP Thickened Adhesive
flagDetails.reason: misplaced -> heritage plaster-lath ceiling system (not a cementitious repair adhesive)
flagDetails.evidence: Gun-grade thickened member of the Westox RAP plaster-lath-ceiling system; it is a thickened acrylic adhesive, not a cementitious concrete repair adhesive. https://westox.com/product/rap-thickened-adhesive/

flagDetails.name: Sika MonoTop FC
flagDetails.evidence: Sika AU PDS: polymer-modified cementitious fairing/finishing mortar, fine aggregates, max 3 mm/layer, off-form-concrete finish; Sika markets it as a Fairing Coat. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-fc.html

flagDetails.name: Sika MonoTop-723 N
flagDetails.evidence: Sika AU PDS: polymer-modified surfacing/finishing mortar, R3, pore-sealer/levelling mortar for minor defects (pores, honeycombing), up to 5 mm/layer - a fairing/levelling coat rather than a structural patch mortar. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-723n.html

flagDetails.name: Mapei Mapefer 1K
flagDetails.evidence: Mapefer 1K is a single-component, polymer-modified CEMENTITIOUS anti-corrosion primer with inhibitors (EN 1504-7), not an epoxy zinc-rich primer; it is already correctly listed under Rebar Primers Inhibitors so this entry is a misplaced duplicate. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapefer-1k

flagDetails.name: SikaTop Armatec 110 EpoCem
flagDetails.evidence: SikaTop Armatec-110 EpoCem is a 3-component cementitious-epoxy bonding primer / reinforcement corrosion protection coating (EN 1504-7) with corrosion inhibitor, NOT a zinc-rich primer; it is already correctly listed under Rebar Primers Inhibitors so this entry is a misplaced duplicate. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/steel-reinforcmentprimers/sikatop-armatec-110epocem.html

flagDetails.name: Mapei Mapefer
flagDetails.evidence: Mapefer / Mapefer 1K is a cementitious applied REBAR coating (EN 1504-7 reinforcement corrosion protection), not a surface-applied or migrating corrosion inhibitor (MCI) for concrete; belongs with rebar primers/coatings. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapefer-1k

flagDetails.name: Mapei Mapefox EW
flagDetails.evidence: No 'Mapefox EW' product exists in Mapei's Australian range or global catalogue; Mapei's AU pure-epoxy chemical anchor for rebar/threaded rod is Mapefix EP 100 (the line is 'Mapefix', not 'Mapefox'). Likely a wrong/fabricated name. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/9

flagDetails.name: Sika Injection-107
flagDetails.evidence: Sika Injection-107 does not appear on the Sika Australia injection catalogue (which lists Injection-111/-111C/-222/-306 and SikaInject-867); it is only catalogued on overseas Sika regional sites. Also mislabelled: the global PDS describes it as a 1-component HYDROPHOBIC water-reactive foaming PU, not a hydrophilic resin. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/waterproofing/injections-and-hydrophilic-systems.html

flagDetails.name: Mapei Mapeject PU 25H / PU 25HD
flagDetails.evidence: 'Mapeject' is not a Mapei product line and 'PU 25H/PU 25HD' match no Mapei SKU. Mapei's PU injection resins are the Resfoam (1-comp) and Foamjet (2-comp) ranges. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions

flagDetails.name: Fosroc Nitoseal MS250 / MS400
flagDetails.evidence: Nitoseal MS250/MS400 are silyl-modified-polymer (MS/SMP hybrid) sealants containing no isocyanates; they are not polyurethane. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/nitoseal-ms250

flagDetails.name: Mapei Mapesil AC
flagDetails.evidence: Mapesil AC is an acetoxy (acetic-cure) silicone sealant, not a polyurethane. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapesil-ac

flagDetails.name: Ardex RA 54
flagDetails.evidence: ARDEX RA 54 is a semi-rigid polyurea control/construction-joint filler for trafficable floors, not a polyurethane sealant. https://ardexaustralia.com/product/ardex-ra-54/

flagDetails.name: Hilti HIT-RE 500 V3 + N12 Bar
flagDetails.evidence: This is the same HIT-RE 500 epoxy adhesive already listed under Epoxy Anchoring Adhesives, paired with a rebar dowel (a rebar-dowelling application, not a distinct product) - duplicate. Also superseded: Hilti AU now supplies HIT-RE 500 V4, not V3. https://www.hilti.com.au/c/CLS_FASTENER_7135/CLS_INJECTABLE_HY200_ADHESIVE_ANCHORS_7135

flagDetails.name: Ramset Chemset Reo 502 PLUS
flagDetails.evidence: Ramset ChemSet Reo502 PLUS is a pure-epoxy anchoring adhesive - it IS an epoxy anchoring adhesive and duplicates that subcategory rather than being a distinct dowel product. https://www.ramset.com.au/product/chemset-reo502-plus

flagDetails.name: Ardex RA55
flagDetails.evidence: No 'RA55' exists in the ARDEX Australia catalogue; ARDEX RA-series codes around this number (RA 54, RA 56) are PU/polyurea crack and joint products, not polymer-modified repair mortars. https://ardexaustralia.com/products/

flagDetails.name: Parchem Speed Rep
flagDetails.evidence: No product named 'Speed Rep' exists in the current Parchem/Fosroc AU catalogue. Parchem's actual rapid cementitious repair mortars are the Renderoc range (Renderoc HB / HB40 / HB70). https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-hb40 ; https://www.parchem.com.au/technical-data/

flagDetails.name: Mapei Eco Prim T Plus
flagDetails.evidence: Eco Prim T Plus is a single-component acrylic universal/levelling primer for absorbent and non-absorbent substrates ahead of smoothing/levelling compounds. It is NOT a moisture-suppression DPM (which must be a 2-part epoxy). Belongs with the levelling system, not moisture barriers. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/eco-prim-t-plus

flagDetails.name: Fosroc Nitoprime 28
flagDetails.evidence: Nitoprime 28 is a two-component solvent-containing modified-epoxy bonding primer used with Fosroc repair compounds (Nitomortar HB, Nitocote ET550). It is an adhesion/bonding primer for repair mortars, not a moisture-suppression DPM. https://www.fosroc.com/product/show/nitoprime-28

flagDetails.name: Parchem Epirez 510
flagDetails.evidence: No current Parchem/Epirez product 'Epirez 510' could be verified in the AU catalogue. Current Epirez epoxy primer/sealer offerings carry other codes (e.g. Epirez 123 Primer/Sealer). Conservative flag pending a valid TDS. https://www.parchem.com.au/technical-data/ ; https://www.itwpf.com.au/epirez/technical-data/technical-data-sheets/

flagDetails.name: Parchem Flowfill RS
flagDetails.evidence: No self-levelling floor underlayment named 'Flowfill RS' is listed by Parchem/Fosroc AU. Parchem's actual self-smoothing floor underlayment is Durafloor Leveltop Rapid; 'Flowfill' in the Fosroc range denotes flowable void-fill/grout, not a flooring self-leveller. http://www.parchem.com.au/construction/product/concrete-underlayment-mortars/durafloor-leveltop-rapid/i/92

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-412 NFG
recommendations.type: R4 fibre-reinforced structural repair mortar (with corrosion inhibitor)
recommendations.reason: Sika AU's flagship structural patch mortar; notable gap in the cementitious range. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-412nfg.html

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-352 NFG
recommendations.type: R3 fibre-reinforced lightweight hand-applied repair mortar
recommendations.reason: Common vertical/overhead R3 patch mortar; complements the R4 412 NFG. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-352nfg.html

recommendations.name: Renderoc HB40
recommendations.type: high-build cementitious repair mortar, R3, ~45 MPa
recommendations.reason: Core current Fosroc AU structural patch mortar; widely specified. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-hb40

recommendations.name: Mapegrout T60
recommendations.type: R4 sulphate-resistant fibre-reinforced thixotropic repair mortar
recommendations.reason: Mapei AU's principal R4 structural repair mortar; should be represented. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapegrout-t60

recommendations.name: Renderoc GP
recommendations.reason: The true general-purpose Fosroc PM repair mortar (the listed 'Renderoc G' is actually a geopolymer corrosion-resistant lining mortar). https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-gp

recommendations.name: Renderoc FC
recommendations.type: cementitious fairing coat (<=3 mm) for fair-faced finish
recommendations.reason: Standard Fosroc AU fairing coat; this subcategory currently has only one Westox product. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-fc

recommendations.name: Mapefinish
recommendations.reason: Mapei AU smoothing/fairing mortar for fair-faced concrete; broadens brand coverage. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products

recommendations.name: Nitomortar S
recommendations.reason: Ready-mixed Fosroc epoxy repair mortar (the listed Nitomortar 903 is an epoxy binder/screed system, not a ready repair mortar). https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/nitomortar-s

recommendations.name: Eporip
recommendations.type: solvent-free 2-part epoxy adhesive for old-to-new concrete bonding
recommendations.reason: Widely used Mapei AU structural epoxy bonding adhesive; no Mapei epoxy present in this subcategory. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/eporip

recommendations.name: Mapefer 1K
recommendations.reason: Mapei AU's standard anti-rust rebar primer; no Mapei rebar primer currently listed. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapefer-1k

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-1010
recommendations.reason: Sika AU successor/companion to MonoTop-910 N; dual rebar-protection + bonding role. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars

recommendations.name: Mapei Planicrete
recommendations.type: SBR synthetic-rubber latex bonding agent / mortar admixture
recommendations.reason: Correct Mapei AU SBR bonding agent (the listed 'Planicrete AC' is the North American name; AU SKUs are Planicrete / Planicrete SP). https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/planicrete

recommendations.name: Nitobond EP
recommendations.reason: Common Fosroc AU epoxy bonding agent; the subcategory holds only SBR/acrylic latex products. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/nitobond-ep

recommendations.name: Conbextra GP
recommendations.reason: Most widely specified Fosroc AU structural grout; no Fosroc grout currently listed. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/conbextra-gp

recommendations.name: Conbextra HF
recommendations.reason: Standard high-flow Fosroc AU precision grout for tight clearances. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/conbextra-hf

recommendations.name: SikaGrout-212 HP
recommendations.type: non-shrink dual-expansion high-performance cementitious structural grout
recommendations.reason: Sika AU's principal structural grout (anchor bolts, bearing pads, 10-100 mm). https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/grouts-anchoring/cementitious-grouts/sikagrout-212-hpau.html

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-436N
recommendations.type: pourable self-compacting R4 micro-concrete repair mortar
recommendations.reason: Sika AU's pourable/flowable R4 mortar - the nearest Sika equivalent to a micro-concrete; complements the single Mapei entry in this subcategory. (Currently listed under Cementitious Repair Mortars.) https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/concrete-repair-mortars/cementitious-repairmortars/sika-monotop-436n.html

recommendations.name: Tremco Evencure AC
recommendations.reason: Correct Tremco CPG Australia curing compound (replaces the non-existent 'Eucocrete WB Cure'). https://www.tremco.com.au/products/evencure-ac

recommendations.name: Sika Antisol AC
recommendations.reason: Genuine Sika AU acrylic curing compound (the listed Antisol-15 SF is a curing/dustproofing/hardening membrane, not specifically acrylic). https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete/admixture-technology/special-admixtures/sika-antisol-ac.html

recommendations.name: Sika Armatec-10 ZR
recommendations.reason: Genuine Sika single-component zinc-rich rebar primer, fills the gap left when the two misplaced cementitious coatings are removed from this subcategory. https://usa.sika.com/en/construction/repair-protection/corrosion-protection/rebar-coatings/sika-armatec-10zr.html

recommendations.name: Sika Armatec 1C
recommendations.type: 1-component cementitious bonding primer / rebar corrosion protection
recommendations.reason: Current Sika 1-component cementitious bonding primer and reinforcement corrosion protection coating; common AU alternative to the 3-component SikaTop Armatec-110 EpoCem. https://usa.sika.com/en/construction/repair-protection/corrosion-protection/rebar-coatings/sika-armatec-1c.html

recommendations.name: Mapei Mapefix EP 100
recommendations.type: pure epoxy chemical anchor (rebar / threaded rod)
recommendations.reason: Correct, real Mapei AU pure-epoxy chemical anchor (ETA / seismic C1-C2, rebar Ø8-Ø40) replacing the non-existent 'Mapefox EW'. https://cdnmedia.mapei.com/docs/librariesprovider8/products-documents/1_1_05809_mapefix-ep-100_en_ccdc260dc89843f68a849f86b383a9d7.pdf

recommendations.name: Sika FerroGard-901
recommendations.reason: Adds the integral/admixture MCI counterpart to the surface-applied FerroGard-903+ already listed; common AU Sika corrosion-inhibitor pairing. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/concrete-repair-protection/corrosion-inhibitorssacrificialanodes.html

recommendations.name: Vector Galvashield XP2
recommendations.type: embedded zinc galvanic discrete anode (higher output)
recommendations.reason: Higher-output discrete galvanic anode (twice the current of XPT), distributed in AU by Parchem/Fosroc; complements the base Galvashield XP entry. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/vector-galvashield-xp

recommendations.name: Mapei Mapegrout T40
recommendations.reason: Current AU Mapegrout structural repair mortar; broadens the Mapei range beyond Mapegrout Thixotropic. https://adheseal.com.au/products/mapegrout-t40

recommendations.name: Mapei Epojet LV
recommendations.type: Very-low-viscosity 2-comp epoxy injection resin (microcracks / damp substrates)
recommendations.reason: Fills the sub-LV microcrack gap below standard low-viscosity epoxies; confirmed on mapei.com/au.

recommendations.name: Sika Sikadur-52 LP
recommendations.reason: AU-available hot-weather / deep-penetration companion to Sikadur-52 AU.

recommendations.name: Sika Injection-111 + Injection-111C
recommendations.type: 1-comp hydrophobic MDI water-reactive PU foam (+ catalyst)
recommendations.reason: Core current Sika Australia hydrophobic PU foam injection SKU; replaces the non-AU Injection-107.

recommendations.name: Mapei Resfoam 1KM
recommendations.reason: Real current Mapei Australia PU injection product; replaces the fabricated Mapeject entry.

recommendations.name: Fosroc Nitoseal PU400
recommendations.type: 1-comp polyurethane trafficable expansion-joint sealant (AS 4020 potable water)
recommendations.reason: Genuine PU expansion-joint sealant; fills the gap left when the MS/silicone products are moved out.

recommendations.name: Sika AnchorFix-3030
recommendations.reason: Current Sika Australia high-performance epoxy anchoring SKU.

recommendations.name: Ramset ChemSet Reo502 XTREM
recommendations.reason: Current Ramset Australia high-performance epoxy for cracked concrete / seismic dowelling.

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-412 NFG
recommendations.type: 1-comp polymer-modified fibre-reinforced structural repair mortar (EN 1504-3 R4)
recommendations.reason: Current Sika Australia R4 structural repair mortar; like-for-like replacement for the questionable SikaTop-121 entry.

recommendations.name: ARDEX BR 340
recommendations.type: Polymer-modified cementitious concrete repair / patching mortar
recommendations.reason: Real ARDEX Australia repair mortar to replace the non-existent RA55 entry.

recommendations.name: Scanmaskin Scan Combiflex 650
recommendations.reason: Widely used AU contractor-grade planetary grinder for removing old magnesite/adhesive residues and profiling concrete prior to DPM application.

recommendations.name: Husqvarna PG 450
recommendations.reason: Common AU-available planetary grinder one step up from the PG 280; suited to larger magnesite removal/preparation areas. https://www.husqvarnaconstruction.com

recommendations.name: Fosroc Renderoc HB40
recommendations.type: Polymer-modified high-build cementitious repair mortar (EN 1504-3 R3)
recommendations.reason: Real current Parchem/Fosroc AU repair mortar to replace the fabricated 'Speed Rep'. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/renderoc-hb40

recommendations.name: Ardex A 38
recommendations.reason: Fast-setting AU patch/screed for filling magnesite removal voids before levelling; complements Feather Finish for deeper fills. https://ardexaustralia.com

recommendations.name: Mapei Mapeproof Primer
recommendations.type: Two-part epoxy moisture barrier / DPM primer
recommendations.reason: Current Mapei AU epoxy moisture-barrier primer; correct DPM class product for chloride/moisture-laden magnesite slabs (replaces the misplaced acrylic Eco Prim T Plus). https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapeproof-primer

recommendations.name: Mapei Triblock P
recommendations.reason: Epoxy-cementitious DPM primer for damp substrates with high residual humidity; well suited to magnesite-affected slabs. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/lines/screeds-and-preparation-of-floor-substrates/category/moisture-barriers

recommendations.name: Ardex WPM 300
recommendations.reason: AU-available Ardex epoxy moisture-barrier alternative/back-up to MC Rapid for suppressing high RH/MVER on remediated slabs. https://ardexaustralia.com

recommendations.name: Parchem Durafloor Leveltop Rapid
recommendations.reason: Real current Parchem/Fosroc AU self-levelling underlayment to replace the unverified 'Flowfill RS'. http://www.parchem.com.au/construction/product/concrete-underlayment-mortars/durafloor-leveltop-rapid/i/92

recommendations.name: Ardex K 55
recommendations.type: Rapid-drying cementitious self-levelling and smoothing compound
recommendations.reason: Current AU Ardex self-leveller suited over moisture-barrier-primed magnesite-remediated slabs. https://ardexaustralia.com/product/ardex-k-55/
